```{r Validation rule 25: completed enrolment without surveillance-end event}
problems <- problems |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    data$enrollments |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$status == "COMPLETED") |>
      dplyr::select("patient_key", "enrollment_key") |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        data$events |> dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "end"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 25L),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key")) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        rule_id        = 25L,
        patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
        enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
        event_key      = NA_integer_,
        context        = list(list()),
        .keep = "none"))
```
